runtime.network: Ошибка сети. Проверьте соединение и попробуйте снова.

auth.userNotFound: Учетная запись с таким e-mail не найдена.
auth.emailAlreadyInUse: Учетная запись с таким e-mail уже существует.
auth.weakPassword: Пароль слишком слабый. Используйте минимум 6 символов.
auth.invalidCredentials: The email or password you entered is incorrect.
auth.userDisabled: This account has been disabled. Contact support for help.
auth.sessionExpired: For security reasons, please sign in again and retry.
auth.accountExistsWithDifferentCredential: An account already exists with this email using a different sign-in method.
auth.credentialAlreadyInUse: This credential is already linked to another account.
auth.googlePlayServicesUnavailable: Google Play Services is unavailable on this device.
auth.googleMissingIdToken: Google sign-in could not be completed. Please try again.
auth.appleMissingIdentityToken: Apple sign-in could not be completed. Please try again.
auth.actionSignInFailed: Unable to sign in right now. Please try again.
auth.actionSignUpFailed: Unable to create your account right now. Please try again.
auth.actionSocialSignInFailed: Social sign-in is unavailable right now. Please try email sign-in.
auth.actionPasswordResetFailed: Unable to send a reset link right now. Please try again.
auth.actionEmailVerificationFailed: Unable to send verification email right now. Please try again.
auth.actionSignOutFailed: Unable to sign out right now.
auth.actionSessionRestoreFailed: Unable to restore your session. Please sign in again.
